sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّبِيبُ الْقَدِيمُ يَعْرِفُ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْأَعْشَابِ.
sentences.translation: Stari ljekar poznavao je mnoge biljke.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient doctor knew many herbs.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَجْمَعُ الْأَعْشَابَ مِنَ الْحَقْلِ وَالْجَبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Skupljao je biljke s polja i planine.
sentences.translationEn: He used to collect herbs from the field and the mountain.

sentences.translation: Pravio je od njih lijek za bolesne.
sentences.translationEn: He would make medicine from them for the sick.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ يَثِقُونَ بِهِ وَيَأْتُونَ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ بَعِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su mu vjerovali i dolazili mu izdaleka.
sentences.translationEn: The people trusted him and came to him from afar.
